_doc: Static file inventory for the diversity atlas. Round-1 ships exactly one file: the bulk JSON snapshot of the 37 MODULE_3 tables embedded in the legacy v2.4 HTML. The shell does not preload it via the file registry today — the data_loader module fetches it directly. Listed here for packaging and integrity checks.

embedded_tables._doc: Single JSON with all 37 dt_* blobs from Diversity_atlas.html v2.4 (D.globals + D.S1..D.S12 + D.ST1..D.ST5 + D.SD1..D.SD8 + D.SZ + D.REF + meta blocks). Loaded once by shared/data_loader.js.
